sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.110 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.727/2025 3. For hearing of main case 27.04.2026 Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, Advocate for the applicant Learned counsel does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
